# Perform — Play tab

Play is the performance surface: custom UI or auto-generated controls, preset strip, **Share…**.

## Where you are

Amorph has three top-level tabs:

| Tab | What you do there |
|-----|-------------------|
| **Build** | Write and edit patch code and UI |
| **Play** | Perform with the loaded patch; **Share…** lives here |
| **Explore** | Browse Community patches, install from links, manage your shared links |

**Window size:** Play uses a compact performance window. Build and Explore share a larger editor window. Switching **Build ↔ Explore** keeps the same window size. Switching **Play ↔ Build** or **Play ↔ Explore** resizes once.

Explore is the only tab with two resize handles (in-page corner grip plus the outer window corner); both remember the same Explore/Build size for the session.

---

---

## Remote control

Settings → Connections → Remote Control provides a URL + QR for browser control of the loaded patch.
This is a **control/performance** path — not a separate authoring surface.
